name: Mrs Fields Nutty White Chunk Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix well with a wire whisk and set aside.
3. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, blend the sugars at medium speed until combined.
4. Add butter and mix to form a grainy paste, scraping down the sides of the bowl.
5. Add eggs and vanilla, and beat at medium speed until light and fluffy.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture, pecans, and white chocolate, blending at low speed until just combined. Do not overmix.
7. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets, 2 inches apart.
8. Bake for 20-22 minutes or until edges begin to turn golden brown.
9. Use a spatula to transfer cookies immediately to a cool, flat surface.
